title: Understanding the Excel Main Interface: Workbook and Worksheet
summary: This skill helps users understand the basic structure of an Excel file, differentiating between a workbook and its constituent worksheets, and how to navigate between them. It is foundational for anyone new to Excel or needing a refresher on its basic organization.

root_steps.title: Identify the Excel Workbook
root_steps.description: Understand that an Excel file is referred to as a workbook, which acts as a container for various sheets of data.

root_steps.title: Locate and Differentiate Worksheets
root_steps.description: Identify individual worksheets within the workbook, accessible as tabs at the bottom of the Excel window, and recognize their role in organizing data.
